state_analysis: We are in /app with chess_board.png present. No usable chess analysis tool is installed. Installing Python packages system-wide is restricted; previous venv is not usable here. To determine the best move, we can render the image in the terminal to inspect the position and choose the move manually.
explanation: Install a terminal image renderer (chafa) via apt, then render chess_board.png in the terminal to visually inspect the chess position. After viewing the board, we can decide the best move and write it to /app/move.txt.
